title: Shell Start Center and placeholder mapping
scenario: When the shell has no open editor tabs, the Start Center action list, docs/help boundary chrome, and terminal placeholder remain reachable through the accessibility tree.

accessible_name.name: Aureline shell window
accessible_name.description: Root accessibility tree for the active shell window.

accessible_name.name: Title and context bar
accessible_name.description: Top-level chrome that exposes identity, workspace context, and primary window actions.

accessible_name.name: Activity rail
accessible_name.description: Primary navigation rail for switching major shell areas.

accessible_name.name: Left sidebar
accessible_name.description: Secondary navigation and context panels adjacent to the main workspace.

accessible_name.name: Main workspace
accessible_name.description: Dominant task surface containing the focused editor group or Start Center entry surface.

accessible_name.name: Right inspector
accessible_name.description: Contextual detail inspector and embedded boundary chrome.

accessible_name.name: Bottom panel
accessible_name.description: Tool panels such as tasks and terminal output.

accessible_name.name: Status bar
accessible_name.description: Status and recovery surface for the active shell session.

accessible_name.name: Transient overlay
accessible_name.description: Transient overlays such as the command palette or sheets.

accessible_name.name: Start Center
accessible_name.description: Project entry surface with governed open/restore/import actions.

accessible_name.name: Start Center actions
accessible_name.description: Primary project entry actions resolved through the command registry.

accessible_name.name: Open folder
accessible_name.description: Open a local folder as the active workspace.

accessible_name.name: Clone repository
accessible_name.description: Clone a remote repository into a new workspace.

accessible_name.name: Restore last session
accessible_name.description: Restore state from the most recent checkpoint.

accessible_name.name: Import from…
accessible_name.description: Import settings and shortcuts from another tool.

accessible_name.name: Aureline project docs
accessible_name.description: Project docs rendered from the local signed pack. Open-in-browser routes through a host-owned handoff and does not grant embedded approval authority.

accessible_name.name: Terminal (placeholder)
accessible_name.description: Terminal output surface placeholder; full semantics not yet available.

support_status.recovery_action_label: Open task output in a supported surface
